title: gladiolus caucasicus
intro: Gladiolus caucasicus, commonly known as the Caucasian gladiolus, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
